# Stellar Cyber

## RSA 2026
- **Booth number and hall:** Booth 327, South Hall.
- **Any updated booth info from the conference floor:** Stellar Cyber is showcasing its award-winning, AI-driven SecOps platform and demonstrating its Human Augmented Autonomous SOC live. They are also highlighting new Agentic AI capabilities, including automated alert triage and automated email phishing triage. The booth will feature a barista. Stellar Cyber has been named a finalist in the 2026 SC Awards for "Best SME Security Solution." They are also a sponsor of the "Cyber Elite Sunset Voyage" cruise on Wednesday, March 25th.

## Company Profile
- **Employee count (approximate):** Approximately 147 employees as of February 28, 2026. Other sources indicate around 143-150 employees.
- **Founded year:** 2015. [cite: 1, 3, 7, 9, 21
